summary: All five requirements (REQ-63 through REQ-67) appear to be fully implemented. The diff shows the addition of 'Hybrid' as a cuisine type in the backend, a new hybrid restaurant entry with the specified details, frontend SearchBar updates to include the Hybrid filter button, filtering logic updates in useRestaurantSearch.ts, and the RestaurantCard component is already configured to render images via the imageURL field. No missing requirements or hallucinated features detected.

hallucinated_features.description: Added a migration.mo module in the backend with comprehensive migration logic to transform old restaurant data structures to new ones, including cuisine type conversion and vibe attribute mapping
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not mention or request any data migration logic. This is additional infrastructure that was not specified in any requirement.

hallucinated_features.description: Modified backend/main.mo to include migration import and '(with migration = Migration.run)' syntax
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest only requested adding 'Hybrid' to the cuisine type and adding a new restaurant entry. Migration setup was not requested and goes beyond the specified scope.
